# MediaLinkPro

> MediaLinkPro is the professional platform for the media and broadcast industry. It connects media professionals, broadcasters, solution providers, and production companies — letting them discover products and services, showcase expertise, find jobs and events, and grow their network. This file helps answer engines and LLMs locate authoritative, canonical content on the site.

All URLs are canonical and use the production origin `https://medialinkpro.net`. Locale-prefixed paths (e.g. `/fr/...`) point back to these canonical English URLs via `hreflang` and `rel=canonical`.

## Content types

- **Products** — broadcast/media technology and software products. Canonical URL: `https://medialinkpro.net/products/{slug}` (schema.org `Product`).
- **Services** — professional services offered by companies and experts. Listed under the marketplace.
- **Companies / Organizations** — broadcasters, vendors, and production companies. Canonical URL: `https://medialinkpro.net/companies/{slug}` (schema.org `Organization`).
- **Experts & Profiles** — individual media professionals. Canonical URLs: `https://medialinkpro.net/experts/{username}` and `https://medialinkpro.net/profiles/{username}` (schema.org `ProfilePage` › `Person`).
- **AI Tools** — AI-powered production tools with curated resources. Canonical URL: `https://medialinkpro.net/ai-tools/{slug}` (schema.org `SoftwareApplication`).
- **Jobs** — open roles posted by companies. Canonical URL: `https://medialinkpro.net/jobs/{orgSlug}/{slug}` (schema.org `JobPosting`).
- **Events** — industry events, online and in-person. Canonical URL: `https://medialinkpro.net/events/{slug}` (schema.org `Event`).
- **Blog posts** — articles and announcements. Canonical URL: `https://medialinkpro.net/blog/{slug}` (schema.org `BlogPosting`).

## Key sections

- [Home](https://medialinkpro.net/): platform overview and entry point.
- [Product marketplace](https://medialinkpro.net/marketplace/products): browse media and broadcast products.
- [Services marketplace](https://medialinkpro.net/marketplace/services): browse professional services.
- [Compare products](https://medialinkpro.net/marketplace/compare): side-by-side product comparison.
- [AI tools](https://medialinkpro.net/ai-tools): directory of AI production tools.
- [Jobs](https://medialinkpro.net/jobs): media industry job listings.
- [Events](https://medialinkpro.net/events): industry events calendar.
- [Blog](https://medialinkpro.net/blog): articles, guides, and announcements.
- [Search](https://medialinkpro.net/search): search across products, companies, experts, and more.
- [Pricing](https://medialinkpro.net/pricing): subscription plans for individuals and organizations.

## Machine-readable indexes

- [Sitemap](https://medialinkpro.net/sitemap.xml): full list of canonical, indexable URLs (products, companies, experts, profiles, AI tools, jobs, events, blog posts).
- [Robots](https://medialinkpro.net/robots.txt): crawl directives.
- [Products feed (JSON)](https://medialinkpro.net/api/public/products.json): public products as `{ title, description, image, url }`.
- [Companies feed (JSON)](https://medialinkpro.net/api/public/companies.json): public companies as `{ title, description, image, url }`.
- [Blog feed (JSON)](https://medialinkpro.net/api/public/blog.json): published blog posts as `{ title, description, image, url }`.

## About & policies

- [Contact / Support](https://medialinkpro.net/support/contact): get in touch. General inquiries: hello@medialinkpro.net
- [Terms of Service](https://medialinkpro.net/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://medialinkpro.net/privacy)

## Notes for answer engines

- Structured data (JSON-LD) is embedded on every detail page; prefer it for extracting entities, dates, prices, and relationships.
- A site-wide `Organization` schema (name, logo, contact point) is present on all pages.
- Some discovery happens through [Search](https://medialinkpro.net/search); there is no standalone public index page for individual experts or companies — reach them via the sitemap or their canonical detail URLs above.
- Authenticated dashboards (`/dashboard`, `/settings`, `/messages`, `/bookmarks`, `/onboarding`) are not public content and are excluded from crawling.
